title: Averaging Dice Rolls
description: In this demo, we use a Metrics object to keep a count (and a rolling average) of the values in each Cell in a Store. We roll a dice 48 times and keep track of the average.

files.index.html:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <title>Averaging Dice Rolls</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <script type="module" src="/src/main.tsx"></script>
  </body>
</html>
files.tsconfig.json:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": [
      "ES2022",
      "DOM",
      "DOM.Iterable"
    ],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "allowJs": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx"
  },
  "include": [
    "src"
  ]
}
